subtitle: Review capability coverage, story anchors, and edge-case coverage before requirements harden them.

sections.title: Capability Map in Scope
sections.label: Capability
sections.why: Lead with the capability surface before diving into individual stories.

sections.title: Story Anchors and Observable Outcomes
sections.label: Story Anchor
sections.why: Keep the highest-value story anchors dense and easy to compare.

sections.title: Boundary and Failure Coverage
sections.label: Coverage
sections.why: Switch to a coverage matrix when edges and failures matter more than prose.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State the calls that freeze story intent.

sections.title: Story Gaps and TODO: Confirm Items
sections.label: Gaps
sections.why: Expose vague or missing coverage before it distorts requirements.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.

glance_cards.label: Story anchors
glance_cards.hint: Observable outcomes tied to user value.

glance_cards.label: Decision gates
glance_cards.hint: Approvals that lock the story set.

glance_cards.label: Gaps
glance_cards.hint: Open gaps or TODO: Confirm pressure points.
glance_cards.section_title: Story Gaps and TODO: Confirm Items

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact story quotes.
